project.name: TextToCAE_SphereImpact
project.prompt: Simulate a steel sphere impacting a clamped steel plate and review the transient dynamic response.

connection.message: Abaqus solved the explicit sphere-to-plate contact model and extracted ODB results.

loads.description: Clamped edges; explicit sphere-to-plate contact with 28 m/s initial sphere velocity

mesh.element_family: S4R shell plate + contact sphere surface

value.en: 100 x 70 x 2 mm clamped plate, 8 mm radius steel sphere
value.zh: 100 x 70 x 2 mm 固支板，8 mm 半径钢球

value.en: Sphere starts above the plate, impacts by initial velocity, and contacts the plate with a hard frictionless normal law.
value.zh: 钢球从板面上方以初速度冲击，通过硬接触法向关系与板材接触。

value.en: Refined contact visualization mesh, displayed spacing about 1.56 mm
value.zh: 接触区细化显示网格，显示间距约 1.56 mm

workflow.detail: The impact request is mapped to plate geometry, material, clamped boundaries, an explicit dynamic step, and direct sphere-to-plate contact.
The Abaqus script creates the clamped shell plate, steel sphere, initial sphere velocity, frictionless hard normal contact, mesh, and explicit job.
Abaqus/Explicit solves the transient contact response and produces an ODB result database.
The exporter extracts stress, displacement, contact indentation, and time frames for browser visualization.
